org.reflections.util

Interface NameHelper

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    QueryBuilder, QueryFunction<C,T>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Reflections, Scanners

    public interface NameHelper
    Helper methods for converting between annotated elements and their names

      • forClass

        default Class<?> forClass(String typeName,
                          ClassLoader... loaders)
        tries to resolve a java type name to a Class

        if optional ClassLoaders are not specified, then both ClasspathHelper.contextClassLoader() and ClasspathHelper.staticClassLoader() are used
